title: cordylostigma prolixipes
intro: Cordylostigma prolixipes, also known as Thai jiaogulan, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, specifically in Thailand and other parts of the region, and is part of the Celastraceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cordylostigma prolixipes include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. Traditional herbal preparations of Cordylostigma prolixipes include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
